evidence: Main window geometry is captured from Tauri physical position/size with scale-factor normalization and persisted to main-window-state.json under app data.
Startup restores saved main window size/position before falling back to cursor-display placement, and reasserts always-on-top after restore.
Restore rejects saved geometry that no longer intersects any current monitor work area, preventing stale off-screen placement after display topology changes.
Rust unit tests cover JSON persistence, malformed JSON fallback, app-data state path construction, physical-to-logical geometry conversion, and off-screen geometry rejection.
remainingEvidence: Runtime relaunch screenshot and terminal output confirming restored geometry were not captured in this CLI run.
The persisted transparency field is recorded in state JSON, but visual transparency relaunch evidence remains pending.

evidence: Tray menu setup adds stable Show AIRI and Quit entries using Tauri tray/menu APIs.
Tray Quit, electron_app_quit, and main-window CloseRequested now route through quit_after_persisting, which persists state and calls app.exit(0).
Rust unit tests cover stable tray menu IDs and tray menu action routing.
remainingEvidence: Runtime ps output showing no cargo/rustc/airi-tauri orphan processes after tray quit and window close was not captured in this CLI run.

evidence: Managed window specs and route tests cover settings, chat, widgets, caption, notice, about, onboarding, devtools, beat-sync, inlay, and dashboard.
stage-tauri build, route Vitest, tauri-eventa adapter tests, typechecks, Cargo tests/build, and whitespace checks passed.
Codex reviewer found notice native-close and widget ttlMs gaps; both were fixed and follow-up review reported no remaining issues.
remainingEvidence: Per-window runtime screenshots were not captured in this headless run.

evidence: apps/stage-tauri/tauri.conf.json already sets the main window alwaysOnTop:true.
apps/stage-tauri/src/window_manager.rs now reapplies set_always_on_top(true) during Tauri setup.
cargo test, cargo build, cargo fmt --check, git diff --check, and stage-tauri typecheck passed.
remainingEvidence: Manual screenshot showing AIRI overlapping another application was not captured in this session.

evidence: Main window startup now centers the floating window on the monitor under the cursor using Tauri monitor_from_point/cursor_position.
Managed windows without explicit coordinates now center on the main/current monitor instead of Tauri global center().
screen get-all-displays/get-primary-display/get-cursor-screen-point now use Tauri monitor/cursor APIs instead of a fake primary display.
Rust unit tests cover display-centered placement, explicit-coordinate precedence, oversized-window origin clamping, and physical-to-logical monitor conversion.
remainingEvidence: Manual multi-display screenshot was not captured in this session.
